title: T.N. Assembly election: BJP may try to split the DMK even if it gets a majority, says Thol. Thirumavalavan
description: ‘I wanted to contest in the Assembly election since 2021. How we function in the Assembly shapes the public perception. Going to Parliament is an honour. But, when I look at Tamil Nadu politics, the BJP’s strategy of gradually weakening regional parties and establishing itself is a cause for concern’
